name: HBP Energy Corp.
summary: HBP Energy Corp., a development stage company, focuses on the provision of consulting services for the cultivation of champignon mushrooms. Its consulting services include consulting in process engineering; improvement of production methods, fruiting techniques, and mushroom quality; spore measurements; packaging; quality of raw materials; recipe; homogeneity; logistics; the process of composting; and hygiene and instructing; and training, as well as consulting services on changes in growing various strains or developing harvesting methods. The company intends to serve small and medium size mushroom growers in El Salvador, Latin America, North America. The company was formerly known as Lido International, Corp. and changed its name to HBP Energy Corp. in August 2013. HBP Energy Corp. was founded in 2012 and is based in Houston, Texas.
